name: VoiceToWebsite Builder
headline: Turn a short idea into a client-ready website preview and source pack
idealFor: Founders, agencies, and operators who need a fast first version
description: VoiceToWebsite Builder is the entry product for buyers who want a polished homepage, a preview they can inspect before buying, and a reserved source bundle tied to their checkout email.
deliveryCopy: Includes a preview-linked source pack reserved to the checkout email.
bullets: Generate a scrollable website preview from a short prompt
Inspect the outcome before you commit to the source pack
Reserve the generated files to the buyer email used at checkout

sections.title: Preview first
sections.description: The homepage now includes a preview studio so buyers can see a generated outcome in a scrollable browser frame before purchasing.

sections.title: Source delivery lane
sections.description: Each generated preview creates a source bundle record that can be fulfilled automatically once Stripe and mail credentials are active.

sections.title: Mobile-ready offer
sections.description: The product pitch, proof, preview, and checkout path are designed to remain legible and high-converting on small screens.

cta.heading: Sell the builder as the fastest path from idea to preview.
cta.body: It is an easy entry offer, it demonstrates the platform quickly, and it creates a natural path into higher-ticket services and subscriptions.

media.title: The builder preview is now part of the homepage
media.body: Buyers can generate a concept, inspect the preview in a scrollable viewport, and then purchase the source pack from the same experience.
